title: Roulinia cordata
taxonomy: Roulinia cordata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This family is further divided into three subfamilies: Caesalpinioideae, Faboideae, and Mimosoideae. Roulinia cordata belongs to the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. This subfamily is a group of legumes with a complex and varied range of characteristics. Roulinia cordata is a member of this diverse and widespread group of flowering plants.
